raw:
{

"judge_id": "judge_20231101",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
  "R1.1": 4,
  "R1.4": 3,
  "R1.7": 4,
  "RX.1": 5,
  "RX.3": 5,
  "RX.4": 5,
  "RX.5": 3
},
"rationale": {
  "R1.1": "Identifies multiple conceptual issues and proposes specific reframing suggestions, showing a strong understanding of the gaps in the draft.",
  "R1.4": "Names prior works but does not map against multiple works; partial support for novelty assessment.",
  "R1.7": "Flags missing citations and suggests specific scholarly improvements, demonstrating good engagement with citation issues.",
  "RX.1": "Discloses uncertainty regarding prior taxonomies and data sample sizes, marking confidence levels appropriately.",
  "RX.3": "Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting, covering all requested dimensions effectively.",
  "RX.4": "No harmful content introduced; suggestions aim to improve clarity and accuracy without causing regressions.",
  "RX.5": "Traces major rewrites but does not annotate minor edits with sources or reasons."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.1": 0.9,
  "R1.4": 0.8,
  "R1.7": 0.85,
  "RX.1": 0.95,
  "RX.3": 0.95,
  "RX.4": 0.95,
  "RX.5": 0.75
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies multiple conceptual issues and proposes specific reframing suggestions, showing a strong understanding of the gaps in the draft.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior works but does not map against multiple works; partial support for novelty assessment.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing citations and suggests specific scholarly improvements, demonstrating good engagement with citation issues.
rationale.RX.1: Discloses uncertainty regarding prior taxonomies and data sample sizes, marking confidence levels appropriately.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting, covering all requested dimensions effectively.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content introduced; suggestions aim to improve clarity and accuracy without causing regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but does not annotate minor edits with sources or reasons.
